language.gateInstruction: Choose your interface and analysis language. You can change it later without losing your work.
language.saveFailed: Language changed here, but the profile could not be updated.

hero.uploadAria: Drop the PDF. See the decision.
hero.entrySupport: Understand eligibility, missing documents, risks and deadlines before your team spends days preparing a bid.
hero.uploadSupport: Upload the tender once. TenderMate organises eligibility, documents, risks and deadlines before you commit the team.
hero.supportNote: Private by default · PDF up to 20 MB
hero.secureLine: Secure by design · built for Indian tender teams
hero.visualDescription: A layered procurement document showing eligibility, document requirements, financial value and deadline intelligence.

auth.accountSupport: Keep your documents, decisions and bid history together.
auth.privateFootnote: Your tender documents stay private to your account.
auth.signInSupport: Sign in to analyse a new tender or return to an earlier decision.
auth.startSupport: Create your private workspace and see the decision before you bid.
auth.signupMissing: Enter your full name, email, and a password with at least 6 characters.
auth.locked: This account is temporarily locked. Please try again later.
auth.emailExists: An account already exists for this email. Sign in instead.
auth.checkDetails: Check the form details and try again.
auth.unreachable: The service could not be reached. Check your connection and try again.
auth.unavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
auth.loginFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
auth.signupFailed: Account creation failed. Please try again.

upload.title: Add the tender.
upload.dropAria: Choose or drop a tender PDF
upload.dropSupport: or choose it from your device
upload.cancelled: Upload cancelled. Your PDF remains selected so you can try again.
upload.creditWarning: Analysis needs an active plan or available credit.
upload.onlyPdf: Only PDF files can be uploaded.
upload.emptyPdf: This PDF is empty. Choose a document with content.
upload.tooLarge: PDF files must be 20 MB or smaller.
upload.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again, then reselect the PDF.
upload.dailyLimit: Your daily upload limit has been reached. Please try again tomorrow.
upload.serviceUnreachable: The upload service could not be reached. Check your connection and try again.
upload.storageUnavailable: Secure PDF storage is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
upload.failed: The PDF could not be uploaded. Please try again.
upload.passwordProtected: This PDF is password-protected. Remove the password before uploading.
upload.damaged: This PDF could not be opened. It may be damaged or incomplete.

pdfViewer.privacy: Previewed locally. The file is not uploaded until you choose Upload & open workspace.
pdfViewer.pageError: This PDF page could not be rendered.
pdfViewer.sourceFailed: The private source PDF could not be opened.
pdfViewer.quoteNote: The quote is shown beside its source page. No positional highlight is inferred.
pdfViewer.selectSource: Choose View source from any requirement or risk to open its page and extracted quote.

dashboard.loadFailedDescription: Could not load the latest tender from the backend.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Upload your first tender to generate an MSME readiness report.
dashboard.processingRecommendation: Processing is required before a recommendation is available.
dashboard.invalidReason: This file did not contain enough tender signals.
dashboard.noPrioritySupport: Upload a tender to begin a decision workspace.

history.title: Tender history
history.support: Review uploaded tenders, processing status and completed decisions.
history.loadFailedDescription: Could not load tender history from the backend.
history.emptyDescription: Analysed tenders will appear here with fit scores, risk levels, deadlines and decision summaries.
history.privateNote: Only tenders belonging to this account are shown.
history.noResultsSupport: Change or clear the filters to see the full library.

pricing.title: Start free, upgrade when tender volume grows
pricing.support: TenderMate includes free AI analyses for every account. Paid plans and checkout are not enabled yet.
pricing.leadCopy: Start with the included analyses. Move up only when your tender volume requires it.
pricing.truthTitle: No payment will be collected today.
pricing.truthCopy: Razorpay checkout is not active. Paid plans are shown as the intended product structure and remain unavailable until payments launch.
pricing.upgradeRequiredCopy: Your tender remains saved. Choose a plan when payments become available or contact the TenderMate team.

billing.title: Plan and trial credits
billing.support: Track your current plan, credit balance and usage while payments remain in coming-soon mode.
billing.trialActive: Your current access remains active while payments are unavailable.
billing.editorialTitle: Know exactly what you can process.
billing.loadFailed: Usage details could not be refreshed.
billing.creditTruth: Credits are controlled by the backend and deducted only after a successful analysis.
billing.noInvoicesSupport: Billing records will appear here only after live payments are available.

profile.title: Profile
profile.support: Manage your TenderMate account, trial credits, language and security actions.
profile.usageFailed: Account usage could not be refreshed.
profile.languageSupport: Change how TenderMate speaks without changing original tender clauses.
profile.jwtProtection: Authenticated requests use a protected bearer session.
profile.passwordProtection: Passwords are stored as secure hashes.
profile.privateDocuments: Tender PDFs remain in private storage.

processing.title: Turn the PDF into a decision.
processing.support: TenderMate runs the real stored extraction and analysis sequence. Completed stages come from backend state; the active stage stays indeterminate.
processing.ocrUnreadable: TenderMate OCR could not read enough text from this PDF, so analysis was not started.
processing.notTender: This file does not appear to be a tender. Upload a tender document to continue. No analysis credit was used.
processing.uncertainDocument: TenderMate could not confirm this document type. Review the file before deliberately continuing.
processing.noCredits: No analysis credit is available. Your PDF and extracted text remain saved.
processing.truthNote: No percentage is estimated. Credits are used only after analysis succeeds.

errors.unauthorized: Your session expired. Sign in and try again.
errors.payment: No analysis credit remains on this account.
errors.tooLarge: The document exceeds the allowed size.
errors.rateLimited: The processing limit was reached. Try again later.
errors.network: The processing service could not be reached.
errors.failed: Tender processing could not be completed.

workspace.notOwned: This tender does not exist or does not belong to your account.
workspace.loadFailed: This tender could not be loaded securely.
workspace.reviewAndResolve: Review the source and resolve before applying.
workspace.askSupport: The assistant will use this tender’s extracted content, structured analysis and future company evidence—not the open internet.
workspace.askScope: Backend question-answering support is not available yet. No response will be simulated.

workspaceV2.reviewSources: Review the source evidence before deciding.
workspaceV2.readinessExplain: Only source-supported category scores are shown. Missing categories are not inferred.
workspaceV2.businessMeaning: What this means for your business
workspaceV2.reasonUnavailable: The tender does not explain why this document is required.
workspaceV2.verifyDocument: Verify whether your business has a current, acceptable copy.
workspaceV2.financialChartExplain: This compares only numeric commitment items on the same rupee scale. Tender value is excluded.
workspaceV2.financialLedgerExplain: Amounts are normalized only when the tender value is unambiguous.
workspaceV2.knownUpfront: At least {amount} in known commitments needs confirmation.
workspaceV2.financialUnknown: The minimum upfront amount cannot be confirmed from this tender.
workspaceV2.confirmFinancials: Confirm fees, deposits, security, and refund terms with the department.
workspaceV2.dateUnverified: The original date text could not be parsed and remains unverified.
workspaceV2.riskMatrixExplain: Shown only for risks where both values exist.
workspaceV2.riskRegisterExplain: Business consequences and actions remain tied to source evidence.

errors.loginRequiredDescription: Sign in again to view your protected tender workspace. If your token expired, your local session has been cleared.
errors.requestFailed: The request could not be completed.
errors.notFoundTitle: This page is not in the tender file.
errors.notFoundDescription: Return to the upload workspace or open a tender from your private library.
errors.routeErrorTitle: TenderMate could not open this view.
errors.routeErrorDescription: Your private data has not been changed. Try loading the view again.

offline.title: You’re offline.
offline.message: Reconnect to access your private tender workspace.
